statement: In every magma, Equation 1121 (`x = y * ((y * (y * x)) * z)`) implies Equation 4680 (`(x * y) * z = (y * z) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0649
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y x)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) z) = (op (op y z) w)
